description.en: Indicates no flag being applied, the value is 0. This flag may be used as a default value for a function keyword argument or as a base value that will be conditionally ORed with other flags. Example of use as a default value: def myfunc(text, flag=re.NOFLAG): return re.match(text, flag) Added in version 3.11.
